description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume epitomises freshness and lasting tenacity. Product Details Rasasi Romance Forever is a perfume spray for men with an exotic aromatic fragrance. Top notes are bergamot, geranium and lemon. The middle notes are spicy, rose and jasmine. The base notes amber, sandalwood and musk. This perfume comes in stylish and fresh transparent flask with a silver top Size 100 ml
